name: Aisha Patel
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We backpacked through Southeast Asia after graduation and have been inseparable ever since.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: My first manager at the startup. Taught me everything about product thinking. We play pickup basketball every other weekend.

name: Sofia Eriksson
bio: Grew up three houses down from each other. Our families still have dinner together every Thanksgiving. She's now a ceramics artist in Stockholm.

name: Liam O'Brien
bio: Shared a tiny dorm room junior year. We bonded over bad instant noodles and jazz records. He plays guitar in a band on weekends.

name: Priya Nair
bio: We joined the same company on the same day and have been each other's sounding boards ever since. We run a tiny online book club together.

name: James Okafor
bio: Lab partners during my master's program. Brilliant mind for data science. Life got busy after he moved to Toronto, but I always think of him.

name: Yuki Tanaka
bio: Moved in next door two years ago. We started a Sunday dinner tradition — she teaches me Japanese recipes and I show her mine.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Best friend from high school football days. He runs a landscaping business now in his hometown. Always makes me laugh harder than anyone.

name: Nadia Kowalski
bio: Met in a brutal organic chemistry study group. We survived together. She's a doctor now, and we hike once a month to decompress.

name: Ethan Rosenberg
bio: Co-founded a side project together that never quite took off, but the experience made us lifelong friends. We still do weekly idea brainstorms over coffee.

name: Amara Diallo
bio: Met at a design conference in Berlin three years ago. Instant connection over a shared dislike of the keynote speaker. She runs a UX studio in Dakar.

name: Ryan Chung
bio: Bonded in the campus computer lab over late-night coding sessions. He's a senior engineer at a gaming studio now. We still do online game nights.
